problem id: 0855605b
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  10100000 -> 00101000
  10101100 -> 11101011
  01010000 -> 00010100
  10010110 -> 01000101
  01011101 -> 11000111
  00000110 -> 01100001
  00001111 -> 11110011
  01100000 -> 00011000

query: 10011011
predicted answer: 10010110
